# Repository Manifest — Mega Brain
# ==============================================================
# Mega Brain is distributed as a single private repository. The
# buyer clones this repo and ingests their own material. There is
# no community/premium split — the cloned repo IS the full product.
#
# This file lists the paths that ship with the repository.
# AUDITED: 2026-06-30
# ==============================================================

# --- Claude Code integration ---
.claude/CLAUDE.md
.claude/agents.yaml
.claude/commands/
.claude/hooks/
.claude/package.json
.claude/rules/
.claude/scripts/
.claude/settings.json
.claude/skills/
.claude/templates/

# --- .claudeignore ---
.claudeignore

# --- .env.example ---
.env.example

# --- .gitattributes ---
.gitattributes

# --- GitHub integration ---
.github/CODEOWNERS
.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/
.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
.github/assets/
.github/layer1-allowlist.txt
.github/workflows/

# --- .gitignore ---
.gitignore

# --- .gitleaks.toml ---
.gitleaks.toml

# --- QUICK-START.md ---
QUICK-START.md

# --- README.md ---
README.md

# --- Agent system ---
agents/_registry/
agents/_templates/
agents/system/

# --- CLI tools ---
bin/

# --- Core engine ---
engine/

# --- Documentation ---
docs/

# --- Knowledge scaffolding ---
knowledge/

# --- Workspace templates ---
workspace/

# --- package.json ---
package.json

# --- requirements.txt ---
requirements.txt
